title: `Aqan #6130
definition:
Akan = "sharp-sighted"

 1) son of Ezer, descendant of Seir, and one of the chiefs of the
    Horites of Edom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Akan = "sharp-sighted"

 1) son of Ezer, descendant of Seir, and one of the chiefs of the
    Horites of Edom

    NASB:  a desc. of Esau
